query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "agenticsts: a bounded-memory testbed for long-horizon llm agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (long-horizon LLM agents operating under bounded/lossy memory) and measures the same dependent variables (agent performance, failure modes, and alignment) on the same domain (LLM agents), providing essential empirical baselines and alternative evaluation frameworks for the user's follow-up research.
